lineage.Process: SpatialJoin MUNI_POLI_FeatureToPolygon CENTROIDES X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\MUNICIPIOS_12082011.shp JOIN_ONE_TO_ONE KEEP_ALL "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\MUNI_POLI_FeatureToPolygon.shp,Id,-1,-1;AREA_1 "AREA_1" true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\MUNI_POLI_FeatureToPolygon.shp,AREA_1,-1,-1;AREAS "AREAS" true true false 15 Double 0 15 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\MUNI_POLI_FeatureToPolygon.shp,AREAS,-1,-1;OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,OBJECTID,-1,-1;MON_MUNI "MON_MUNI" true true false 70 Text 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,MON_MUNI,-1,-1;COD_DEPTO "COD_DEPTO" true true false 10 Text 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,COD_DEPTO,-1,-1;TIPO "TIPO" true true false 80 Text 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,TIPO,-1,-1;COD_DANE "COD_DANE" true true false 7 Text 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,COD_DANE,-1,-1;DEPTO "DEPTO" true true false 30 Text 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,DEPTO,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,X:\PERSONAL\LIMITES_CORTE_POLIGONO\CENTROIDES.shp,Shape_Area,-1,-1" INTERSECT # #

SpatialJoin MUNICIPIOS_12082011 ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES V:\SOLICITUDES\LIMITES_17_08_2011\MUNICIPIOS_BIEN.shp JOIN_ONE_TO_ONE KEEP_ALL "AREAS "AREAS" true true false 15 Double 0 15 ,First,#,Z:\MBC\MBC_CIENMILES\DIVISION_POLITICA\MUNICIPIOS_12082011.shp,AREAS,-1,-1;OID_ "OID_" true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,OID_,-1,-1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,Shape_Area,-1,-1;NOMBRE_ENT "NOMBRE_ENT" true true false 120 Text 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,NOMBRE_ENT,-1,-1;CATEGORIA "CATEGORIA" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,CATEGORIA,-1,-1;DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,DEPARTAMEN,-1,-1;COD_DEPART "COD_DEPART" true true false 2 Text 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,COD_DEPART,-1,-1;COD_MUNICI "COD_MUNICI" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,COD_MUNICI,-1,-1;AREA_KM "AREA_KM" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,I:\Mantenimiento_Bases\DOCUMENTOS\LIMITES 100.000 2011\ENTIDADES_TERRITORIALES.shp,AREA_KM,-1,-1" WITHIN # #
Dissolve Departamentos "C:\Documents and Settings\amcorteso\Mis documentos\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\Departamentos_Dissolve" DEPARTAMEN # MULTI_PART DISSOLVE_LINES

FeatureClassToFeatureClass Departamentos_Dissolve D:\Proyecto\MBC_CIENMILES\MAURICIO_CORTES\LIMITES_17_08_2011\LIMITES.mdb Departamentos_Colombia # "DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,C:\Documents and Settings\amcorteso\Mis documentos\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\Departamentos_Dissolve,DEPARTAMEN,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,C:\Documents and Settings\amcorteso\Mis documentos\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\Departamentos_Dissolve,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,C:\Documents and Settings\amcorteso\Mis documentos\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\Departamentos_Dissolve,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
CalculateField Departamentos_Colombia Observacion "En proceso de Aprobación. Sujeto a cambios" VB #
CalculateField Departamentos_Colombia Observacion "En proceso de Aprobación. Sujeto a cambios" VB #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass "V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\CIENMILES\LIMITES\LIMITES.mdb\Departamentos_Colombia" "V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\BASE500K\500K_FILE_MAGNA.gdb\Entidades_Territoriales_y_Unidades_Administrativas" Departamentos_Colombia # "DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\CIENMILES\LIMITES\LIMITES.mdb\Departamentos_Colombia,DEPARTAMEN,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\CIENMILES\LIMITES\LIMITES.mdb\Departamentos_Colombia,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\CIENMILES\LIMITES\LIMITES.mdb\Departamentos_Colombia,Shape_Area,-1,-1;Observacion "Observacion" true true false 100 Text 0 0 ,First,#,V:\Proyecto 100.000 2011\ACTUALIZACION DE LA BASE CARTOGRAFICA\CIENMILES\LIMITES\LIMITES.mdb\Departamentos_Colombia,Observacion,-1,-1" #

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: MUNI_POLI_FeatureToPolygon

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows 2000 Version 5.2 (Build 3790) Service Pack 1; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.2.4.1420

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

bounding.westbc: REQUIRED: Western-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.eastbc: REQUIRED: Eastern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.northbc: REQUIRED: Northern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.
bounding.southbc: REQUIRED: Southern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

distFormat.formatName: Clase de entidad de geodatabase de archivos

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.1.0.3035

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
